lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਮ ਜਗ ਜਪ ਤਪ ਸਭਿ ਸੰਜਮ ਤਟਿ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hom jag jap tap sabh sanjam tatt teerath nahee paaeaa |
lines.english: Through burnt offerings, charitable feasts, ritualistic chants, penance, all sorts of austere self-discipline and pilgrimages to sacred shrines and rivers, they do not find God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹੰਬੁਧਿ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਹੈ ਮੈਲੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਭਵਜਲਿ ਫੇਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ahanbudh duramat hai mailee bin gur bhavajal feraa |3|
lines.english: They are proud and arrogant, evil-minded and filthy; without the Guru, they are reincarnated into the terrifying world-ocean. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਟਿਆ ਆਪੁ ਪਏ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਗਤੁ ਤਰਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: mittiaa aap pe saranaaee guramukh naanak jagat taraaeaa |4|1|14|
lines.english: Self-conceit is only erased when one seeks the Lord's Sanctuary and becomes Gurmukh; O Nanak, he crosses over the world-ocean. ||4||1||14||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਨ ਮਹਿ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਤ੍ਰਿਣ ਮਹਿ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਉਦਾਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ban meh pekhio trin meh pekhio grihi pekhio udaasaae |
lines.english: I have seen Him in the woods, and I have seen Him in the fields. I have seen Him in the household, and in renunciation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੰਡਧਾਰ ਜਟਧਾਰੈ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਵਰਤ ਨੇਮ ਤੀਰਥਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: danddadhaar jattadhaarai pekhio varat nem teerathaae |1|
lines.english: I have seen Him as a Yogi carrying His staff, as a Yogi with matted hair, fasting, making vows, and visiting sacred shrines of pilgrimage. ||1||
I have seen Him in the Society of the Saints, and within my own mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਭ ਪਇਆਲ ਸਰਬ ਮਹਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਰਸਿ ਮੰਗਲ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aoobh peaal sarab meh pooran ras mangal gun gaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In the sky, in the nether regions of the underworld, and in everything, He is pervading and permeating. With love and joy, I sing His Glorious Praises. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗ ਭੇਖ ਸੰਨਿਆਸੈ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਜਤਿ ਜੰਗਮ ਕਾਪੜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jog bhekh saniaasai pekhio jat jangam kaaparraae |
lines.english: I have seen Him among the Yogis, the Sannyaasees, the celibates, the wandering hermits and the wearers of patched coats.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਪੀ ਤਪੀਸੁਰ ਮੁਨਿ ਮਹਿ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਨਟ ਨਾਟਿਕ ਨਿਰਤਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tapee tapeesur mun meh pekhio natt naattik nirataae |2|
lines.english: I have seen Him among the men of severe self-discipline, the silent sages, the actors, dramas and dances. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਹੁ ਮਹਿ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਖਟ ਮਹਿ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਦਸ ਅਸਟੀ ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: chahu meh pekhio khatt meh pekhio das asattee sinmritaae |
lines.english: I have seen Him in the four Vedas, I have seen Him in the six Shaastras, in the eighteen Puraanas and the Simritees as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਿਲਿ ਏਕੋ ਏਕੁ ਵਖਾਨਹਿ ਤਉ ਕਿਸ ਤੇ ਕਹਉ ਦੁਰਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabh mil eko ek vakhaaneh tau kis te khau duraae |3|
lines.english: All together, they declare that there is only the One Lord. So tell me, from whom is He hidden? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਹ ਅਗਹ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਨਹ ਕੀਮ ਕੀਮ ਕੀਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: agah agah beant suaamee neh keem keem keemaae |
lines.english: Unfathomable and Inaccessible, He is our Infinite Lord and Master; His Value is beyond valuation.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਜਿਹ ਘਟਿ ਪਰਗਟੀਆਏ ॥੪॥੨॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: jan naanak tin kai bal bal jaaeeai jih ghatt paragatteeae |4|2|15|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is a sacrifice, a sacrifice to those, within whose heart He is revealed. ||4||2||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਨਿਕਟੇ ਅਰੁ ਭੇਦੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hai nikatte ar bhed na paaeaa |
lines.english: He is near, but this mystery is not understood.
One who gathers corruption, constantly feels fear.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਕਟਿ ਬੁਝੈ ਸੋ ਬੁਰਾ ਕਿਉ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: nikatt bujhai so buraa kiau karai |
lines.english: How can anyone do evil, if he realizes that the Lord is near?
Everyone says that He is near, near at hand.
Without the True Guru, all are enticed by Maya. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭੇਦੁ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਕੋ ਲਹੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh bhed viralaa ko lahai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: But rare is that person, who, as Gurmukh, understands this mystery. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਈ ਠਗਉਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: pee tthgauree har sang na jaaniaa |
lines.english: Under the influence of the drug of illusion, he does not know that the Lord is with him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਦੇਖੈ ਪਰ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: nikatt na dekhai par grihi jaae |
lines.english: The mortal does not see the Lord near at hand; instead, he goes to the homes of others.
He steals their wealth and lives in falsehood.
Not understanding that the Lord is near, he tells lies.
Without the Guru, he is confused and deluded by doubt. ||2||
In love and attachment to Maya, the fool is plundered.
That which he seeks is within his own self, but he looks for it outside.
One whose good karma is recorded on his forehead
Without the Guru, he is confused and deluded by doubt. ||3||
serves the True Guru; thus the hard and heavy shutters of his mind are opened wide.
Within his own being and beyond, he sees the Lord near at hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਵੈ ਨ ਜਾਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੪॥੩॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: jan naanak aavai na jaavai koe |4|3|16|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, he does not come and go in reincarnation. ||4||3||16||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੁਝ ਹੀ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਗਲ ਸੰਸਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh tujh hee antar sagal sansaarai |
lines.english: All beings, and the entire universe, is within You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਉਨੁ ਮਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis too raakheh tis kaun maarai |
lines.english: Who can kill that person whom You protect, O Lord?
Save me, save me, O Lord; shower me with Your Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਹੋਵੈ ਜਿ ਕਰੈ ਚੋਜ ਵਿਡਾਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: so hovai ji karai choj viddaanee |1|
lines.english: but that alone happens, which the Lord of wondrous plays does. ||1||
I seek Your Sanctuary, and Your Court. ||1||Pause||
The mortal thinks up millions of plans,
Whoever serves the Fearless Lord, the Giver of Peace,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਭਉ ਦੂਰਿ ਕੀਆ ਏਕੁ ਪਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: tin bhau door keea ek paraataa |
lines.english: is rid of all his fears; he knows the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੂ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਫੁਨਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo too kareh soee fun hoe |
lines.english: Whatever You do, that alone comes to pass in the end.
What do you think, with your human understanding?
There is no other who can kill or protect us. ||2||
The Creator Lord knows everything. ||3||
The All-knowing Lord is the Searcher of Hearts.
That person who is blessed by the Creator's Glance of Grace
The One and only Lord is my Support and Protection.
